description_long: This is a large, ornate wooden roll-top desk with a dark, rich finish and a classic design. The desk features a raised back section with three open cubbyholes and two glass-fronted compartments, all topped by a decorative rail. The main work surface is spacious and flat, suitable for writing or working. Below the desktop, there are two pedestals, each containing three drawers with brass handles, and a central drawer above the knee space. The craftsmanship is detailed, with beveled edges, carved feet, and a robust, traditional appearance. The overall look suggests a piece designed for a formal office or study, offering ample storage and workspace.
description: A large, dark wooden roll-top desk with multiple drawers, glass-fronted compartments, and ornate detailing. It features a spacious work surface and a raised back section with cubbyholes and decorative rail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the desk's drawers, central knee space, and the raised back section with cubbyholes and glass compartments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's depth, thick wooden panels, and the profile of the raised back section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back and the full width of the raised section, with no visible drawers or compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same depth and profile as the other side, with the raised back section and solid wood construction.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers, central knee space, and raised back section with cubbyholes and glass compartments is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front.
attribute_usage_context: executive writing and document management desk
